questionHtml: Predict, giving a reason, how the value of the ΔS⦵reaction would be affected if I2 (g) were used as a reactant.
markschemeHtml:
ΔS⦵reaction lower/less positive AND same number of moles of gas

OR

ΔS⦵reaction lower/less positive AND a solid has less entropy than a gas ✔

meta.title: Predict, giving a reason, how the value of the ΔS⦵reaction would be affected if I2 (g) were used as a reactant.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.4.2—Change in Gibbs energy, ΔG, relates the energy that can be obtained from a chemical reaction to the change in enthalpy, ΔH, change in entropy, ΔS, and absolute temperature, T. Apply the equation ΔG⦵ = ΔH⦵ − TΔS⦵ to calculate unknown values of these terms.
